reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdGR5Qm5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada si se esta transitando de San Luis a San Juan, es el primer lugar donde se consiguen semitas con chicharrón (pedirlas en el shop como tortitas) y uno sabe que llegó a tierras sanjuaninas, hay que cargar con paciencia porque suele haber cola, de varios autos, el personal de shop es atento y muy amable, igual que el personal de playa, los sanitarios siempre estan limpios, y son comodos. Punto ideal para descansar de la tension del cruce del desierto, hay agua para el mate que se da a una temperatura de 80 grados aprox, a una suma simbólica de 50 pesos al momento de esta reseña, colaborar con los bomberos que siempre están en la ruta solicitándolo a cambio de calcos o souvenirs.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop if you're traveling from San Luis to San Juan, this is the first place where you can get semitas with chicharrón (ask for them at the shop as "tortitas"). You'll know you've arrived in San Juan province! Be prepared for a long wait, as there's usually a line of several cars. The shop staff is attentive and very friendly, as are the beach attendants. The restrooms are always clean and comfortable. It's the perfect spot to relax after the stress of crossing the desert. They have hot water for mate, served at about 80 degrees Celsius, for a symbolic 50 pesos at the time of this review. Consider donating to the firefighters who are always along the route, asking for stickers or souvenirs in exchange.
